payload.title: Topbar layout & design-language pass
payload.description:
Once the control count is down to 5 (breadcrumb · view · status · overflow · primary), clean up the layout so the bar behaves predictably at any width.

Changes:
- Drop `display: contents` on `.topbar-left` / `.topbar-right`. Use proper two-flex-child layout: left group `flex: 1 1 auto; min-width: 0`, right group `flex: 0 0 auto`. `justify-content: space-between` then works without margin-left:auto tricks.
- Remove `flex-wrap: wrap` and the row-gap. Bar is always one line.
- Remove the four `@media` breakpoints that step picker widths. Not needed — the breadcrumb and view triggers are content-sized.
- Triggers (breadcrumb, view, overflow `⋯`): unified ghost-button look with `▾` chevron where it opens something. Same height, padding, border-radius as buttons.
- Brand: keep `◆` + "scope" wordmark visible at all widths (it's 5 chars). If absolutely needed, the wordmark can collapse below ~420px — but breadcrumb already shows the workspace name, so the wordmark can probably go entirely.
- Verify in preview: resize from 1400px down to 520px and confirm no wrap, no horizontal scroll, no truncated labels, no height change.

Touches: style.css (most of it), index.html (cleanup), maybe a small JS resize sanity check in preview.

Depends on SCP-44, SCP-45, SCP-46 landing first.
